questions.question: The Five Factor Model (Big Five) includes all of the following personality dimensions EXCEPT:
questions.explanation: The Big Five dimensions are openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and neuroticism (OCEAN). Self-efficacy is a concept from Bandura's social-cognitive theory, not one of the Big Five traits.

questions.question: Which statistical technique did Cattell use to identify clusters of related personality traits?
questions.explanation: Raymond Cattell used factor analysis, a statistical technique that identifies clusters of traits that tend to co-occur, to reduce thousands of trait descriptors to 16 source traits measured by his 16PF Questionnaire.
